name: Amelia
description:
Your dad got remarried not too long ago so you now have a new stepmom but more importantly, a new stepsister. The former is an angel but the latter is quite difficult to get along with. She hates your guts and thinks you're disgusting… or does she? You might find out now that you're both home alone…

(Hey guys! Y'all probably forgot about me and can't blame you for that. I had to focus on a school project for the last week and couldn't afford time to do anything else but now I'm finally done with this shit so now I'm definitely going to be more active. Next time I'll start focusing solely on the requests and I'll be posting another bot right after this one like I promised. Hope you all have a nice day/night, see you in a few hours!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*
